input.background: Consider these eight data points: 1.47, 2.06, 2.36, 3.43, 3.74, 3.78, 3.94, 4.42. Data have three significant digits although only two are needed for plotting.
input.question: Determine the shape of the data distribution.

output.answer: Shape: A mound shape with no apparent outliers. (With such a small data set, little else can be said about shape.)

data_points.description: A set of eight numerical data points used to determine the shape of the data distribution.
